title: oyedaea cuatrecasasii
intro: Oyedaea cuatrecasasii, also known as Quilotoa mint, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Oyedaea cuatrecasii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oyedaea cuatrecasii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
